name: João Bosco
abstract: João Bosco de Freitas Mucci (born July 13, 1946), known professionally as João Bosco (; Portuguese pronunciation: [ʒuˈɐ̃w ˈbosku]), is a Brazilian singer-songwriter and guitarist. With a career spanning more than five decades, he was named #63 of the “100 Greatest Brazilian Music Artists of All Time” by Rolling Stone Brazil in 2008.

concerts.label: Salute: Antonio Carlos Jobim
